Mercury and Sun, while Jupiter is aspecting these planets or when
Jupiter is
aspecting Mars and Mercury, results in such mischievous
tendency, The causitive planet is Mars. It also indicates special
intelligence that should be properly directed. Suppose there is
abundant water flowing out of a bore well or any other source of
water and that the water is actually ring out. If that water flow
is not properly controlled or directed or utilised, the overflowing
water may become a cause of many troubles, to others. If the
water flow is regulat.:d, it becomes extremely useful. In the same
way mischievous children, having extraordinary energy and
intelligence, control, guidance and proper channelisation of the
resources they posses.
An astrologer studying the horoscope of such children
would be able to pinpoint this to the elders of the children, so that
the elders come to know the real cause of the trouble being caused
by their children and guide them in proper path. Thus an
